description: Configure Thunderbird's settings to support a deliberate, distraction-free 'Inbox Zero' workflow. Disable the automatic marking of messages as read, set messages to open in a new window instead of a tab, and enable the option to close the message window upon moving or deleting a message. Disable both visual alerts and sound notifications for incoming mail. Additionally, configure the Local Folders account to empty the trash on exit. Ensure all settings and account tabs are closed once the configuration is complete.
